warning_message: HbA1c lap lai trong khoang qua ngan co nguy co bi query hoac xuat toan
recommended_action: Chi lap lai khi co ly do lam sang ro rang va ghi chu giai trinh

rule_name: Chi dinh creatinine khong gan boi canh
warning_message: Creatinine can duoc gan voi theo doi tang huyet ap dai thao duong hoac chuc nang than
recommended_action: Giai trinh boi canh lam sang neu chi dinh ngoai goi y thong thuong

rule_name: Statin can lien ket nguy co tim mach
warning_message: Thuoc statin nen co lien ket chan doan roi loan lipid hoac nguy co tim mach
recommended_action: Ghi nhan chan doan lien quan hoac nguy co tim mach dong mac

rule_name: Dien tam do can boi canh tim mach
warning_message: Dien tam do ngoai tru nen co trieu chung hoac nguy co tim mach phu hop
recommended_action: Bo sung trieu chung hoac ly do chi dinh trong ghi chu
